# BearerAuthGateOptions.RequiredScopes property

The scopes a valid token MUST grant; a token lacking one yields a `403` insufficient_scope challenge (§23.8, R-23.8-f). Empty/absent means no scope is enforced.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<string>? RequiredScopes { get; set; }
```
